vocab.meaning: là phần thiết yếu/đặc trưng của cái gì
vocab.example: Long drives were part and parcel of our summer holidays, and I embraced every moment of them.

vocab.meaning: nhóm người buộc phải lắng nghe (vì không thể đi đâu)
vocab.example: I loved being in the car because my parents were a captive audience for all my rambling childhood stories.

vocab.meaning: xác nhận/đảm bảo cho điều gì
vocab.example: I can personally vouch for the joy of those trips; they were truly the peak of my childhood.

vocab.meaning: leo trèo lên (thể hiện sự hào hứng của trẻ con)
vocab.example: The moment the engine started, I would clamber up into my seat with total excitement.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại cảm xúc/sự đồng cảm
vocab.example: The smell of old car leather still strikes a chord with me, bringing back memories of our family excursions.

vocab.meaning: vào lúc tảng sáng/sáng sớm tinh mơ
vocab.example: We used to set off at the crack of dawn to avoid traffic, which made the journey feel like a secret adventure.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó bị mê hoặc/cuốn hút hoàn toàn
vocab.example: The changing landscapes passing by the window would hold me in thrall for the entire duration of the trip.
That those car journeys were the best part of my youth is beyond all dispute.

vocab.meaning: phá cách/khác biệt so với thường lệ
vocab.example: Our family road trips really broke the mold of our otherwise very disciplined and routine-heavy daily life.

vocab.meaning: hưởng thành quả/lợi ích (từ việc kiên nhẫn đi xa)
vocab.example: Even though the drives were long, we would reap the rewards the moment we saw the ocean on the horizon.
